name: Madhouse Wallet — Virtual USD Account & Global Business Payments
description: Virtual USD bank account with routing and account numbers. Collect direct debit and recurring bank payments from US customers. Send payouts to Kenya, Nigeria, India, China, and 43+ currencies. Built for international businesses.

shortcuts.name: Open an Account
shortcuts.description: Create your Madhouse Wallet business account
